items.summary: In `backend/main.mo`, update/refine the existing `PUBLIC ACTOR API & TYPES (BACKWARD COMPATIBILITY: LEGACY INVENTORY)` comment block so it inventories **all currently exposed public canister methods** and key public types present in the file, and explicitly marks them as “must remain backward compatible” for this micro-step (documentation-only; do not rename/remove methods or types).

In `backend/main.mo`, make the backward-compatibility documentation internally consistent by ensuring the comment immediately above the `UserProfile` type explicitly states that the Phase 1 fields `planTier`, `botPublicKey`, and `bot_id` are intentionally OPTIONAL for backward compatibility with previously stored profiles and older frontend calls, and remove/adjust any wording that could be interpreted as those fields being required.

In `backend/main.mo`, verify (and if necessary, minimally adjust) any `UserProfile` record literals/constructors so that when a profile is constructed without an explicit bot id, it sets `bot_id = null` explicitly (do not rely on missing-field inference), preserving compatibility for callers that omit `bot_id`.
